back_translation: A psalm of David. O LORD, I lift up my soul to You.
O my God, I trust in You; let me not be put to shame; let not my enemies exult over me.
Surely none who wait for You will be put to shame, but those who betray without cause will be disgraced.
O LORD, show me Your ways; teach me Your paths.
Guide me in Your truth and teach me, for You are the God of my salvation; I wait for You all day long.
Remember, O LORD, Your compassion and Your steadfast love, for they have been from everlasting.
Do not remember the sins of my youth and my transgressions; O LORD, remember me according to Your steadfast love, for the sake of Your goodness.
Good and upright is the LORD; therefore He shows sinners the way.
He guides the humble in what is right and teaches them His way.
All the ways of the LORD are steadfast love and faithfulness for those who keep His covenant and His decrees.
O LORD, for the sake of Your name, forgive my iniquity, for it is great.
Who is the one who fears the LORD? He will teach him the way he should choose.
His soul will dwell in well-being, and his descendants will inherit the land.
The LORD is an intimate friend to those who fear Him, and He reveals His covenant to them.
My eyes are always on the LORD, for He will free my feet from the net.
Turn to me and be gracious to me, for I am lonely and afflicted.
The troubles of my heart increase; bring me out of my distress.
Look upon my affliction and my trouble, and take away all my sins.
Look upon my enemies, for they are many, and they hate me with violent hatred.
Guard my life and deliver me; let me not be put to shame, for I take refuge in You.
May integrity and uprightness preserve me, for I wait for You.
O God, redeem Israel from all its distress.
